name: midi2_cpp
description: C++17 Arduino-style wrapper for MIDI 2.0 on embedded devices. Thin wrapper over the portable midi2 C99 library. Covers UMP, MIDI-CI with Appendix E, Profile, PE Subscribe/Notify, Process Inquiry, Flex Data, Bit Scaling.
keywords: midi, midi2, usb, ump, capability-inquiry, property-exchange, profile
